Dicebox

Tap dice to load them

Hold one for more options

Flick the tray to roll

3d6
three six-sided dice
1d20+5
with a modifier
2d6+1d8
any number of terms
2d20kh1
advantage — keep highest
2d20kl1
disadvantage — keep lowest
4d6dl1
drop lowest
1d6!
explode on a max roll
1d10r2
reroll 2 and under
d%
percentile, same as d100

Tap dice to build a pool; the number on the left is how many each tap adds. Hold a die for advantage, exploding, and the rest. Any number of sides works, from d1 to d1000, so a d17 or a d57 is just as valid. Rolls stay on your device.

This is the single-file build: it already works offline, and can be copied anywhere.

Source on GitHub · Download as one file

d20

Custom die

— Pick dice or type a roll
